zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Saint-Omer於大約1085年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Guillaume de St. Omer22歲，母親Aganitrude de Bruges22歲。他和Melisende Picquigny至少有4個兒子和7個女兒。他去世於1132年之後在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Saint-Omer于大约1085年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Guillaume de St. Omer22岁，母亲Aganitrude de Bruges22岁。他和Melisende Picquigny至少有4个儿子和7个女儿。他去世于1132年之后在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Saint-Omer was born about 1085, in Normandy, France, his father, Guillaume de St. Omer, was 22 and his mother, Aganitrude de Bruges, was 22. He had at least 4 sons and 7 daughters with Melisende Picquigny. He died after 1132, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Saint-Omer est né environ 1085, à Normandie, France, son père, Guillaume de St. Omer, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Aganitrude de Bruges, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles avec Melisende Picquigny. Il est décédé après 1132, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Saint-Omer um 1085 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume de St. Omer 22 und seine Mutter Aganitrude de Bruges 22. Er hatte mit Melisende Picquigny mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb nach 1132 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Saint-Omer è nato il circa 1085 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume de St. Omer, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Aganitrude de Bruges, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie con Melisende Picquigny. Morì dopo il 1132, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Saint-Omerが約1085年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Guillaume de St. Omerは22歳，母Aganitrude de Brugesは22歳であった。彼はMelisende Picquignyとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼は1132年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Saint-Omer(이)가 대략 1085년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de St. Omer(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Aganitrude de Bruges(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Melisende Picquigny(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1132년 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Saint-Omer nasceu aproximadamente 1085, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Guillaume de St. Omer, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Aganitrude de Bruges, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas com Melisende Picquigny. Ele faleceu após 1132, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Saint-Omer родился около 1085 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume de St. Omer было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Aganitrude de Bruges, 22. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей от Melisende Picquigny. Он умер после 1132 г. в его родном городе.

sm.Abt 1085–Aft 1132: e tusa o le 1085–ina ua ma'ea le 1132

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Saint-Omer nació aproximadamente 1085, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de St. Omer, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Aganitrude de Bruges, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas con Melisende Picquigny. Murió después de 1132, en su pueblo.
